steps.title: Foundations
steps.objective: Build essential groundwork for your career

tasks.title: (Building regulations related)
tasks.description: Study building regulations related to plumbing, drainage, and water safety

children.title: Industry Fundamentals
children.objective: Understand the core concepts of plumber

tasks.title: (Apprenticeship or associate)
tasks.description: Complete an apprenticeship or associate diploma in plumbing

tasks.title: (Install and maintain)
tasks.description: Learn to install and maintain water supply systems, drainage, heating, and gas pipework

children.title: Tools & Environment
children.objective: Set up your professional workspace

tasks.title: (Pipe fitting)
tasks.description: Develop skills in pipe fitting, soldering, and using specialist plumbing tools

children.title: Installation Of Water Supply And Drainage Systems Proficiency
children.objective: Develop proficiency in installation of water supply and drainage systems
resources: Installation Of Water Supply And Drainage Systems Resources

tasks.title: (Supervised work experience)
tasks.description: Complete supervised work experience with a licensed plumber

children.title: Pipe Fitting And Soldering Proficiency
children.objective: Develop proficiency in pipe fitting and soldering

tasks.title: (Plumbing license or)
tasks.description: Obtain your plumbing license or certification as required in your region

children.title: Heating System Installation (Boilers, Radiators) Proficiency
children.objective: Develop proficiency in heating system installation (boilers, radiators)

tasks.title: (For plumber positions)
tasks.description: Apply for plumber positions or work toward self-employment

children.title: Testing And Commissioning Plumbing Systems Proficiency
children.objective: Develop proficiency in testing and commissioning plumbing systems
resources: Testing And Commissioning Plumbing Systems Resources

tasks.title: (Testing and commissioning)
tasks.description: Practice testing and commissioning plumbing systems 1

steps.title: Practical Application
steps.objective: Gain hands-on experience through projects or simulations

children.title: Applied Practice Project
children.objective: Apply core skills in a realistic scenario
prerequisites: installation of water supply and drainage systems

children.title: Advanced Capstone
children.objective: Demonstrate comprehensive mastery
prerequisites: installation of water supply and drainage systems

children.title: Specialization Track
children.objective: Deep dive into a specific area
prerequisites: installation of water supply and drainage systems

steps.title: Career Launch
steps.objective: Land your first role in the field

children.title: Professional Branding
children.objective: Create compelling professional presence

children.title: Job Search Strategy
children.objective: Execute systematic job search
